name: Falcomon
description: A Bird Digimon that lives on 3000m-tall mountains. As its wings are not very developed, it's not so much able to fly as it is able to glide; to make up for that, it is able to run about craggy mountains at great speed with its powerful legs. Because it has a rough temperament, you must be careful because if you approach carelessly, you will get fiercely attacked. Its Special Moves are scratching the opponent with its wing claws ( Scratch Smash ), and an attack it unleashes using its powerful leg strength ( Falco Rush ).
